languages.text: {n}Вигдис обращается к вам сдержанно, почти холодно.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, флагман находится в расчетной точке прибытия. Внештатных происшествий за время трансляции не выявлено. Объявлена полная боевая готовность. Старшие офицеры в эфире и ожидают ваших приказов".

{n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."
languages.original_text: {n}Вигдис обращается к вам сдержанно, почти холодно.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, флагман находится в расчетной точке прибытия. Внештатных происшествий за время трансляции не выявлено. Объявлена полная боевая готовность. Старшие офицеры в эфире и ожидают ваших приказов".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

{n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

{n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly.{/n} "Lord Captain, the fleet is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the shift. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

{n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

languages.text: {n}ヴィグディスは慎重に、まるで冷たく、あなたに語りかける。{/n}「艦長様、艦隊は計算された到着地点に達しました。交代中に予期せぬ事象は検知されていません。戦闘態勢は整っています。上級将校たちは耳を傾け、あなたの命令を待っています」
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly.{/n} "Lord Captain, the fleet is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the shift. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: ヴィグディスは慎重に、まるで冷たく、あなたに語りかける。「艦長様、艦隊は計算された到着地点に達しました。交代中に予期せぬ事象は検知されていません。戦闘態勢は整っています。上級将校たちは耳を傾け、あなたの命令を待っています。」

languages.text: {n}Vigdis se dirige a ti en tono reservado, casi frío.{/n} «Lord Capitán, la nave insignia está en el punto de llegada previsto. No se han detectado incidencias durante el viaje. Todas las fuerzas están listas para combatir. Los oficiales esperan sus órdenes».
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis se dirige a ti en tono reservado, casi frío.{/n} «Lord Capitán, la nave insignia está en el punto de llegada previsto. No se han detectado incidencias durante el viaje. Todas las fuerzas están listas para combatir. Los oficiales esperan sus órdenes».

languages.text: {n}维格迪斯用克制且近乎冰冷的语气向你汇报。{/n}“舰长大人，旗舰已抵达预定坐标。跃迁期间无异常。全员战备状态确认。高阶军官正在频道待命，听候您的指示。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}维格迪斯用克制且近乎冰冷的语气向你汇报。{/n}“舰长大人，旗舰已抵达预定坐标。跃迁期间无异常。全员战备状态确认。高阶军官正在频道待命，听候您的指示。”

languages.text: {n}Vigdis spricht dich mit einer reservierten Kälte an:{/n} "Lord Captain, das Flaggschiff befindet sich am berechneten Ankunftspunkt. Es gab während der Translatio keine unerwarteten Zwischenfälle. Volle Kampfbereitschaft wurde bestätigt. Die leitenden Offiziere erwarten Eure Befehle."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis spricht dich mit einer reservierten Kälte an:{/n} "Lord Captain, das Flaggschiff befindet sich am berechneten Ankunftspunkt. Es gab während der Translatio keine unerwarteten Zwischenfälle. Volle Kampfbereitschaft wurde bestätigt. Die leitenden Offiziere erwarten Eure Befehle."

languages.text: {n}Vigdis sana mesafeli, neredeyse soğuk bir şekilde hitap ediyor.{/n} "Sancak gemisi, hesaplanan varış noktasında Lord Kaptan. Geçiş sırasında beklenmedik bir olay tespit edilmedi. Tam savaşa hazırlık durumu onaylandı. Kıdemli subaylar sizi dinliyor ve emirlerinizi bekliyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis sana mesafeli, neredeyse soğuk bir şekilde hitap ediyor.{/n} "Sancak gemisi, hesaplanan varış noktasında Lord Kaptan. Geçiş sırasında beklenmedik bir olay tespit edilmedi. Tam savaşa hazırlık durumu onaylandı. Kıdemli subaylar sizi dinliyor ve emirlerinizi bekliyor."

languages.text: {n}Vigdis s'adresse à vous avec retenue, presque froidement : {/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, le vaisseau a atteint le point d'arrivée prévu. Aucun incident inattendu n'a été signalé lors de la traversée. L'entièreté de la flotte est parée au combat. Les officiers supérieurs sont en ligne et attendent vos ordres. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis s'adresse à vous avec retenue, presque froidement : {/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, le vaisseau a atteint le point d'arrivée prévu. Aucun incident inattendu n'a été signalé lors de la traversée. L'entièreté de la flotte est parée au combat. Les officiers supérieurs sont en ligne et attendent vos ordres. »
